login.session_expired: Your session expired. Please sign in again.
login.subtitle_phone: Sign in with your phone number
login.phone_hint: We'll text you a 6-digit code to sign in.
login.email_hint: We'll send you a magic link to sign in.
login.email_sent_detail: Click the link in the email to sign in. You can close this tab.
login.error_rate_limit: Too many attempts — please wait a few minutes before trying again.
login.error_wait_moment: Please wait a moment before requesting another code.

settings.language_hint: Sets the language for your organization's interface.
